details: The agent navigated to all three sites (Wikipedia, GitHub, rust-lang.org) and correctly reported: (1) Graydon Hoare as the designer of Rust, (2) 111k stars on the GitHub repo, and (3) the exact tagline 'A language empowering everyone to build reliable and efficient software.' from rust-lang.org. All data was obtained from actual page snapshots, not hallucinated.
